description_long: This is a round table with a smooth, flat circular top and three straight cylindrical legs evenly spaced around the perimeter. The entire table is coated in a uniform, deep blue color with a matte, slightly textured finish that gives it a modern and minimalist appearance. The legs are slender and appear to be made of metal, providing a sturdy yet lightweight structure. There are no visible joints, fasteners, or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional design. The tabletop is relatively thin, and the overall proportions suggest it is suitable for casual seating or as a side table in urban environments. Its simple geometry and bold color make it stand out in public spaces such as parks, plazas, or outdoor cafes.
description: A round, deep blue table with a smooth, matte finish and three slender cylindrical legs. Its minimalist design and bold color make it suitable for modern urban settings.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the front, showing the circular top and three evenly spaced legs, with two legs fully visible and one partially hidden.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the round tabletop and reveals the spacing of the three legs, with one leg mostly hidden behind the tabletop.
description_view_2: The table is viewed from the opposite side, showing the same circular top and three legs, with the central leg at the back more visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the table from a slightly rotated angle, emphasizing the round top and the arrangement of the three legs, with one leg more prominent in the foreground.
